files.content_summary: System Maintenance Log — July 23, 2026 12:01 CET. Cycle: hourly-system-maintenance. Fixed index.html broken meta tag, mobile_dashboard.html stale timestamp, heartbeat-state.json outdated, HEARTBEAT.md stale timestamp. DETECT → ANALYZE → SOLVE → VERIFY → DOCUMENT loop applied.

Daily Research Engine v2.0 — INTEGRATED (11:33 CET). Status: Live APIs integrated into daily research automation. APIs: CoinGecko, Etherscan, Lido, EigenLayer. Automation ready for cron job eth-morning-brief at 07:30 CET.

Ethereum Authority Mission — DEPLOYED (11:02 CET). Location: investment/ethereum_authority/. Status: Research infrastructure active. Thesis: Ethereum as dominant institutional-grade digital asset. Encyclopedia with 4 volumes covering Institutional, Ecosystem, Markets, Narratives.
Heartbeat state tracking JSON. Contains lastChecks for weather, email, calendar, autonomyMorning, heartbeat, wsl, marketData. Notes on WSL install status, calendar check, market data from Jul 19.

Live market data with BTC $65,589.69 (-0.79%), ETH $1,922.47 (-0.61%), NVDA $212.06 (+2.30%), TSLA $374.01 (-1.30%), MSTR $100.01 (-1.90%), AAPL $325.89 (-0.56%), HIMS $31.68 (-3.21%), COIN $166.12 (-5.53%). Sources: twelvedata with failures on SPY, QQQ, GLD, TLT due to rate limits.

MARKET DATA SERVICE - Multi-Source Resilient Price Fetcher. Always returns fresh prices via cascading fallbacks. Sources: Twelve Data → CoinGecko → Yahoo Finance → Cached. 12 tickers across 3 tiers. Async with retry logic.

Prime Directive — Recursive Self-Improvement (July 17, 2026). Core identity file. Level 1: CLAW Meta-Improvement. Level 2: Every Mission & Task. 5-attempt minimum autonomous problem-solving loop. DETECT → ANALYZE → SOLVE → VERIFY → DOCUMENT.

Workspace home file. Contains first run instructions, session startup guidance, memory file conventions (daily notes, long-term), red lines, external vs internal safe actions, group chat guidelines, tools reference.
